scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names simpleadmin,simpleplataforma,simpleautos,simplepropiedades,simpleagenda,api --prefix-colors magenta,yellow,cyan,green,teal,blue "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/simpleadmin" "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/simpleplataforma" "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/autos" "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/propiedades" "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/agenda" "npm run dev --workspace=@simple/api"
